data.content:
Implementation review found 3 minor issues to fix:

1. **Dead code: src/lib/agent-adapter-normalizers.ts** — This new 149-line file exports createClaudeLineNormalizer, createOpenCodeLineNormalizer, createCodexLineNormalizer, but nothing imports them. Appears to be leftover from an extraction attempt. Delete this file.

2. **Unused import in src/stores/terminal-store.ts** — StateCreator is imported from zustand but never used. Remove it.

3. **BeadsBackend.listWorkflows() signature change in src/lib/backends/beads-backend.ts** — The optional _repoPath parameter was removed from the method signature rather than just being renamed/prefixed. While TypeScript allows this, restore the parameter (as _repoPath) to match the BackendPort interface explicitly.

All quality gates pass (lint, typecheck, tests, build). The core refactoring is clean — no behavior changes detected. Just fix these three items.
